# External Dependencies
# 下载时间: 2025-02-25

## GOST
- 版本: v3.2.6
- 仓库: https://github.com/go-gost/gost
- 源码目录: gost/
- Release 文件:
  * gost_3.2.6_linux_amd64.tar.gz
  * gost_3.2.6_linux_386.tar.gz
  * gost_3.2.6_linux_arm64.tar.gz
  * gost_3.2.6_windows_amd64.zip
  * gost_3.2.6_windows_386.zip
  * gost_3.2.6_windows_arm64.zip

## gost-ui
- 版本: master (latest)
- 仓库: https://github.com/go-gost/gost-ui
- 源码目录: gost-ui/
